title: Gambling Ship
writer: Peter Ruric, Max Marcin, Seton I. Miller
actors: Cary Grant, Benita Hume, Jack La Rue
plot: Tired of the dangerous life as gambling boss, Ace Corbin 'retires' from the racket and travels cross-country by train to begin a new life with a new name. On the train, he meets Eleanor and they fall in love. Eleanor is afraid to ...
